description_long: This object is a Kalashnikov-style assault rifle, featuring a dark wooden fixed stock and handguard, with a matte black metal receiver and barrel assembly. The rifle has a prominent curved detachable box magazine, typical of the AK-47 family, and a visible trigger guard beneath the receiver. The front end of the barrel is equipped with a slotted flash hider, and the iron sights are mounted both at the rear and front of the barrel. The overall construction combines wood and metal, giving it a robust and utilitarian appearance. The rifle's design is iconic, with a blend of angular and rounded elements, and is commonly seen in urban and military contexts.
description: A Kalashnikov-style assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, black metal receiver, and a curved detachable magazine. It features iron sights and a slotted flash hider at the barrel tip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the wooden stock, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel, front sight, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, curved magazine, and the receiver details.
description_view_3: Rear-on view focusing on the stock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
